overview.problem: Imported root harness files described an unrelated project and made PA Agent restart checks misleading.
overview.target_behavior: Root harness docs, plan template, and init.sh describe and validate the PA Agent repository.

out_of_scope: Prompt, schema, and settings model behavior

credentials_or_local_state: No credentials or private runtime records are required.

steps.description: Inspect the imported harness files and PA Agent repository truth.
Replace wrong-project harness docs and refactor plan layout.
Replace init.sh with PA Agent local checks and ignore nested worktrees.
expected_changes: PA Agent local harness validation script

steps.description: Record verification, update handoff, and move this plan to completed.

skipped.reason: The optional unit/property suite runs under offscreen Qt but currently has existing app-level failures unrelated to this harness-doc cleanup.
skipped.follow_up: Fix the failing application tests separately, then rerun.

skipped.reason: The optional lint gate currently reports existing source/test lint drift unrelated to this harness-doc cleanup.
skipped.follow_up: Run a dedicated lint cleanup before making lint a required gate.

skipped.reason: Not required for harness/documentation changes and may require a suitable local GUI/data environment.
skipped.follow_up: Run before completing changes that alter integration behavior.

skipped.reason: Not required for harness/documentation changes; live checks require external services and credentials.
skipped.follow_up: Run only when changing GUI workflows or live-provider/data-source behavior.

commands_run.summary: Required artifact, plan layout, whitespace, shell syntax, nested worktree ignore, and Python import smoke checks passed.
Confirmed offscreen Qt prevents widget-test abort for the local pytest toggle.
Offscreen Qt avoided aborts, but the existing unit/property suite reported 31 failures unrelated to this docs/harness cleanup.
Existing lint drift reported 3603 ruff findings.

manual_checks: Confirmed worktree-dev-dispatch-qt/ is ignored by the root repo.

progress_log.entry: Plan created after confirming imported harness docs came from an unrelated project.
Replaced root harness docs, refactored docs/plan, converted init.sh, and added focused nested-worktree ignore policy.
Required harness validation passed; broad optional test/lint failures were recorded as existing follow-up work.

completion.summary: The root workflow harness now reflects PA Agent ground truth and the local startup gate validates PA Agent artifacts instead of unrelated project files.
follow_up: Address existing unit/property test failures separately.
Address existing lint drift before treating RUN_LINT=1 as a required gate.
